hyperedges.description: Before/after image comparison slider demonstrating the Mittler Senior Technology website redesign by Oasis of Change, showing transformation from a basic layout to a modern, metrics-driven design.

The about page constructs a visual narrative through three images: stock imagery representing digital work, a 'Founded in 2024' badge establishing the timeline, and Gabriel Dalton's portrait introducing the founder.
Two distinct photographic representations of Gabriel Dalton used across the site: a B&W artistic portrait for bio sections and a TEDx stage photo for credibility/speaking on the homepage.

nodes.label: Rationale: Read GRAPH_REPORT.md Before Answering Architecture Questions
Rationale: Navigate Wiki Instead of Raw Files
Rationale: Rebuild Graph After Code Modifications
Modern Lounge Interior Photo
nodes.description: Stock photo of a modern minimalist interior lounge space with dark leather armchairs on a polished concrete floor, large windows with natural light, and industrial-modern architectural elements. Used as a featured image in the blog resources section.

nodes.label: Business Consultation / Financial Review Photo
nodes.description: Stock photo of two professionals reviewing financial documents at a desk. A man in a green shirt and a woman in an orange blouse examine paperwork, with a calculator, folders, envelopes, and papers spread on the table. Conveys consulting, financial planning, or business advisory services. Used as a featured image in the blog resources section.

nodes.label: E-Commerce Browsing Photo
nodes.description: Stock photo of a woman browsing an e-commerce clothing website (VanArsdel brand) on a laptop while holding a cup of tea. She is seated on a couch with a wooden lap desk. Represents digital commerce, online shopping, or SaaS product interfaces. Used as a featured image in the blog resources section.

nodes.label: Design Portfolio / Art Book Review Photo
nodes.description: Stock photo of a person in a gray sweater flipping through an art or design portfolio book on a small wooden side table with a modern donut-shaped ceramic vase. The book shows sketches and illustrations. Conveys creativity, design thinking, and workflows. Used as a blog card thumbnail for articles about tools and strategies for efficient workflows.

nodes.label: Portrait of Young Woman
nodes.description: Minimalist portrait photo of a young woman with light brown hair wearing a beige/cream sweatshirt against a neutral gray background. Clean, professional editorial style. Used as a blog card thumbnail for articles about data analytics and SaaS business insights.

nodes.label: Strategic Planning Whiteboard Photo
nodes.description: Stock photo of a hand placing a yellow sticky note labeled 'FORECAST' on a whiteboard with other sticky notes and handwritten annotations including red arrows. Represents strategic planning, forecasting, and business process management. Used as a blog card thumbnail for articles about SaaS industry trends and predictions.

nodes.label: About Page Hero - Person Working on Laptop
nodes.description: Stock photo of a person wearing sunglasses and an orange turtleneck working on a laptop. Used as the hero image on the about page to represent building sustainable digital experiences.

nodes.label: About Page - Founded in 2024 Image
nodes.description: Stock photo of a woman in a beanie using a laptop at a wooden table with popcorn and water. Overlaid with a bold 'Founded in 2024' badge in green text. Used on the about page to establish the founding date of Oasis of Change.

nodes.label: Etymology of 'Oasis of Change' Diagram
nodes.description: A typographic diagram on a black background explaining the name 'Oasis of Change'. 'OASIS' is annotated as 'A place of renewal, possibility, and hope'. 'OF' is described as 'The bridge between the two'. 'CHANGE' is annotated as 'The action that turns hope into something real'. Uses green accent text and white display type.

nodes.label: Gabriel Dalton Portrait Photo
nodes.description: Black and white headshot portrait of Gabriel Dalton, a young man with light hair wearing a dark shirt and a necklace, outdoors with trees in the background. Used on the about page and Gabriel Dalton bio page as his primary portrait.

nodes.label: Gabriel Dalton TEDx Talk Photo
nodes.description: Photo of Gabriel Dalton on stage delivering a TEDx talk. He is wearing a maroon sweater with a headset microphone, gesturing with both hands. A projection screen behind him shows partial text including 'AI Lit...' suggesting the talk is about AI literacy. Used on the homepage.

nodes.label: Tree-Nation Collaboration Banner
nodes.description: Banner image reading 'In Collaboration With' above the Tree-Nation logo (a stylized tree icon inside a teal circle with the text 'tree-nation' in teal/green gradient). Used on the tree planting page to indicate the reforestation partnership.

nodes.label: Mittler Senior Technology Website - Before Redesign Screenshot
nodes.description: Screenshot of the original Mittler Senior Technology website before the Oasis of Change redesign. Shows a traditional layout with a left sidebar navigation, a 'Tech Tip Tuesday' banner, and sections for 'Private Technology Assistance' and 'Group Classes'. The design uses a basic white layout with green and blue accents, featuring a simpler, less modern visual style.

nodes.label: Mittler Senior Technology Website - After Redesign Screenshot
nodes.description: Screenshot of the redesigned Mittler Senior Technology website after Oasis of Change's involvement. Features a modern full-width hero section with 'Technology Education for Senior Citizens' headline, green CTA buttons ('For Seniors', 'For Organizations'), impact metrics (3500+ seniors impacted, 450+ classes taught, 150+ teens inspired, 10+ countries reached), and a clean navigation bar with a 'Sponsor a Class' CTA. Significantly more polished and contemporary design.

nodes.label: Gabriel Dalton
nodes.description: Founder of Oasis of Change. Young technologist focused on digital sustainability and climate-conscious technology.

nodes.label: Oasis of Change
nodes.description: Nonprofit organization focused on digital sustainability, founded in 2024.

nodes.label: Tree-Nation
nodes.description: Reforestation platform that partners with Oasis of Change for tree planting initiatives.

nodes.label: Mittler Senior Technology
nodes.description: Organization providing technology education for senior citizens, run by high school and college students. Client of Oasis of Change's redesign services.

nodes.label: TEDx
nodes.description: TEDx event where Gabriel Dalton delivered a talk, likely on AI literacy.

nodes.label: About Page
nodes.description: The about page of the Oasis of Change website.

nodes.label: Tree Planting Page
nodes.description: The tree planting page of the Oasis of Change website.

nodes.label: Homepage
nodes.description: The homepage of the Oasis of Change website.

nodes.label: Mittler Senior Technology Case Study Page
nodes.description: Case study page for the Mittler Senior Technology website redesign.

nodes.label: Gabriel Dalton Bio Page
nodes.description: Biography page for Gabriel Dalton.
